fields.caption_top: ai art for your six-figure tech startup

narrative_summary: Drake rejects the polished AI art that signals 'low social literacy' and approves the blog post's deadpan alternatives — the niece's drawing and jspaint.app — calling out the absurdity that hand-drawn chaos now carries more social credibility than a six-figure worker's AI output.
rationale: Candidate 3 earns its specificity points by naming jspaint.app — a real, absurd detail from the source article — which transforms a generic 'child drawing beats AI' joke into something that rewards readers who know the story. The jspaint.app callout also sharpens the punchline: it's not just a crayon scrawl, it's a crayon scrawl made in a retro browser paint tool, which escalates the absurdity one beat further than every other candidate.
place: inside a Terms of Service agreement
hat_pair: shower cap covered in sticky notes
helmet made entirely of rubber ducks
